texto: We didn't have to talk, and it wasn't awkward. We were just two lonely, out of place people sharing a holiday with junk food from the vending machine and a Claymation classic on the television." oh and later "I guess its a good thing we found each other then.
autor: J.M. Richards Tall Dark Streak of Lightning
explicacao: Orientação direta de J.M. Richards Tall Dark Streak of Lightning sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We didn't have to talk, and it wasn't awkward. We were just two lonely, out of place people shari…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, anna, cuteness, útil em momentos de termino e reflexao-noturna.
